'''The Palace''' in the [[Historical District]] of [[Estalle Island]] on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]] was the center of power in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] during the [[Dynastic Era]], thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the glittering palace was a [[Museum/Legends|museum]] that presented a somewhat biased version of Tapani history.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
